questions.q: What is the term used to describe the process of increasing the economic well-being of people?
Which of the following is a characteristic of a developing country?
Explain the concept of trickle-down theory. How does it relate to economic development?
What is the significance of the Millennium Development Goals (MDGs) in the context of global development?
Compare and contrast the economic development strategies of the World Bank and the International Monetary Fund (IMF).
What is the term used to describe the process of achieving economic and social development in a sustainable manner?
Which of the following is a key challenge faced by developing countries in achieving economic development?
Explain the concept of human development index (HDI). How does it differ from GDP per capita?
What is the significance of the United Nations Development Programme (UNDP) in promoting sustainable development?
Compare and contrast the development strategies of the Chinese government and the Indian government.
